channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump threatens attacks on Iranian power plants over opening Strait of Hormuz - AP News
item.description:
1. Trump threatens attacks on Iranian power plants over opening Strait of Hormuz  AP News
  2. Live updates: Iran war news; Trump threatens to ‘obliterate’ Iran’s power plants  CNN
  3. Trump and Iran Trade Threats Over Energy Targets as War Escalates  U.S. News & World Report
  4. A Look at the Escalating Battle for the Strait of Hormuz  The New York Times
  5. Graham to Trump: Consider removing ‘US bases from countries who won’t let us fly from them’  The Hill

item.title: After 25 years of socialist rule, where does Paris go now? - CNN

item.title: WHO says strike on Sudan hospital kills at least 64, takes facility out of service - Reuters
item.description:

  4. WHO says attack on Sudan hospital killed 64, including 13 children  Al Jazeera

item.title: Iran launched missiles at US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. Here’s what that says about its capabilities - CNN
item.description:
1. Iran launched missiles at US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. Here’s what that says about its capabilities  CNN
  2. No assessment Iran capable of striking London, Steve Reed says  BBC
  3. Trump proven right on Iran's long-range missile capability as regime targets US-UK base, experts say  Fox News
  4. U.K. confirms Iran fired two missiles at British-American base in Indian Ocean which failed to reach their target  CNBC
  5. Iran not believed to have capability or intent to bomb Britain, says UK minister  The Guardian

item.title: Trump's mixed messages on Iran: 'Winding down' the war and easing sanctions but adding more troops - AP News

item.title: Iran war enters its fourth week with no clear end in sight - NPR
item.description:
